settings.title: Settings
settings.screenBurnInWarning: Displaying a static image for a long time can cause screen burn-in on some screens.
settings.menuButtonHint: To access the menu, swipe from the left edge of the screen

home.addFirstConnection: Click the button below to add your first connection!

addConnection.name: Name
addConnection.ipRequired: The IP Address / Hostname is required.

insecureConnection.title: Connection failed
insecureConnection.heading: I was able to connect but there were some problems ⚠️
insecureConnection.body: It seems like your browser blocks the connection because of security issues. This is caused by the client being accessed over a https connection and the server is not accessed wss. To solve this, allow insecure connections from https in your browser.

connectionLostPage.heading: I lost the connection to the server

scanNetwork.title: Scanning networks...
scanNetwork.multipleFound: Multiple network interfaces were found. Tap on the correct network interface to apply it.

qrScanner.useQuickSetup: Use Quick Setup to setup the connection
qrScanner.openOnComputer: Open Macro Deck on your computer and scan the QR code
qrScanner.cameraPermission: Please grant camera permission to use the barcode scanner.

webHome.connectionLost: I lost the connection to the server

connectionLost.title: Connection lost
connectionLost.heading: I lost the connection to the server
connectionLost.subtext: Maybe the server was stopped or the connection dropped.

connectionFailed.title: Unable to connect to {{name}}
connectionFailed.reasonsIntro: There can be multiple reasons why this happens:
connectionFailed.reasonAntivirus: Your anti virus software or firewall blocks Macro Deck (Common issue)
connectionFailed.reasonAdapter: The wrong network adapter is chosen in the settings on the PC app
connectionFailed.reasonPort: The chosen port is used by another application
connectionFailed.reasonNetwork: Your computer and this device are not in the same network
connectionFailed.reasonVpn: If you're using VPN services, disable them
connectionFailed.reasonRestart: A restart of your computer can help sometimes
connectionFailed.reasonWifi: If you're using a 5GHz Wi-Fi connection, try to switch to 2,4GHz temporarily
connectionFailed.reasonRouter: Some routers block the communication between Ethernet and Wi-Fi. Check your router settings. Look for SSID isolation or AP isolation and disable it.

connection.waitingForAccept: Waiting for the host to accept the connection...

update.alreadyLatest: You're already on the latest version.
update.downloadFailedMessage: Could not download the update. Please check your network and try again.
